title: Application Modernization with Agentic AI
detail: AI now automates the cloud-native development tasks that once demanded deep specialization. In this workshop, you'll learn to assess, modernize, and deploy applications hands-on using Agentic IDEs, ATX, and ISV tooling.

title: EKS Anywhere on VMware Workshop
detail: Lern how to provision Amazon EKS Anywhere cluster on VMware vSphere environment and dive-into the EKS-A cluster capabilities.
